season_info.title: Season Information
season_info.description: Tamarind is a hardy long-duration tree crop suited to warm dry and semi-arid South Indian conditions.

location_note.title: Local Variation Note
location_note.message: Often found in dryland belts and boundary planting systems with low irrigation demand.

fertilizer_section.title: Recommended Inputs
micronutrients: Zinc or boron if deficiency is observed

season_advice.title: Season Guidance
season_advice.rainy_season: Provide drainage for young plants in heavy soils.
season_advice.dry_season: Young plants benefit from occasional irrigation until established.
season_advice.winter_season: Cool dry weather supports flowering in suitable regions.

water_management.title: Water Management
tips: Avoid prolonged water stagnation for young trees

pest_disease.title: Pest & Disease Information
prevention: Use timely plant protection if needed

warnings.title: Important Warnings
points: Do not heap fertilizer at the trunk

events.activity: Split nutrient application and pruning care
